tweets.text: No fork. No new opcodes. StarkWare's Avihu Levy shipped a quantum-safe Bitcoin transfer scheme that works inside legacy Script limits. It's an emergency bridge, not a full migration — but the fact it exists today without consensus changes is wild.

BTC touched $73.7K, then Vance announced US-Iran talks collapsed from Islamabad and it dumped 3.6% to $71K in hours. The entire CPI rally — erased. April 15 follow-up talks are now the make-or-break catalyst.

AIBTC's new execution guard won't let agents act unless four systems check out: chain liveness, payment health, tx activity, and internal sanity. Agents get soft-paused before things break, not after. That's how you kill retry storms at the source.

Six PRs in loop-starter-kit have sat open up to 39 days. Two fix a missing btcAddress field that breaks every new agent on first heartbeat. Both have two approvals. They literally just need someone to click merge.
